projects.name: Personal Portfolio Website
projects.description: A responsive personal portfolio website to showcase my skills, projects, and contact information using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

projects.name: Yamaha Website Clone
projects.description: A frontend clone of the Yamaha website created to practice layout design, responsiveness, and modern UI using HTML and CSS.

projects.name: Simple To-Do List App
projects.description: A basic to-do list application that allows users to add, delete, and manage daily tasks using JavaScript.

projects.name: Simple Login Page
projects.description: A login system built with Node.js backend that handles user authentication using sessions and cookies to maintain user login state.
